headline: Explore the top gainers and losers within the S&P500 index in today's session.
summary: Curious about the top performers within the S&P500 index one hour before the close of the markets on Tuesday? Dive into the list of today's session's top gainers and losers for a comprehensive overview.

headline: Shares of precious metals companies are trading higher amid a weaker dollar and declining oil prices, which are helping ease inflation concerns after remarks from Donald Trump suggested the Middle East conflict could end soon.

headline: Freeport-McMoRan Inc. (FCX) Upgraded to Buy as Copper Outlook Improves
summary: Freeport-McMoRan Inc. (NYSE:FCX) ranks among the best mineral stocks to invest in. On February 20, Freedom Capital Markets raised Freeport-McMoRan Inc. (NYSE:FCX) from Hold to Buy and boosted its price target to $76 from $47. The firm emphasized the company’s standing as a key copper producer, accounting for roughly 9% of global supply. headline: Stan Druckenmiller's Copper Bet Is Looking Prescient— Prices Swing As AI Demand And Tariff Fears Collide
summary: Copper is having one of its most turbulent months in years — and it's making Stan Druckenmiller look prescient. With Goldman Sachs flagging tariff-driven supply chaos and J.P. Morgan projecting a 330,000 metric ton deficit in 2026, the billionaire's "perfect storm" thesis from late February is already playing out in real time.

headline: Copper shortage looms as tariff fears, mine disruptions fuel tightness
summary: "It's like an artificial tightness right now in the markets because you have all this material in the U.S., but not enough outside," a strategist told CNBC.

raw.headline: Copper shortage looms as tariff fears, mine disruptions fuel tightness
